{{Quote|Who am I? I am the future!|[[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]]|<ref name="CWA" />}}
The '''Mission to Trenchant space station''' was a skirmish fought between [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]], [[Durge/Legends|Durge]], and [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==The mission==
[[File:Durgegrievous.jpg|thumb|left|200px|[[Durge/Legends|Durge]] is defeated by [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]].]]

[[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] sent [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] and the [[Gen'Dai/Legends|Gen'Dai]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Durge/Legends|Durge]] on a mission to [[Space Station Trenchant/Legends|Space Station Trenchant]]. The real purpose on the mission was to select the new [[Supreme Commander of the Droid Armies/Legends|Supreme Commander of the Droid Armies]]. The third candidate for the role was the [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]], [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]].<ref name="CWA" />

The pair started on their mission to identify their common enemy, reaching the trophy room together which was filled with [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi apparel/Legends|robes]] and [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]]. Armed with an [[Electrostaff/Legends|electrostaff]] Grievous appeared and defeated Durge initially. Asajj then arrived and fought Grievous, who was again victorious.<ref name="CWA" />

The pair then teamed up, Asajj using her paired lightsabers and Durge unleashing his full arsenal, including his [[Magna bolas|energized bolas]]. The pair seemed victorious as Asajj knocked the electrostaff away. Grievous, though, was far from beaten, and unleashed his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]]. The pair was quickly defeated by his [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|lightsaber skills]].<ref name="CWA" />

==Aftermath==
Grievous, as the victor, was appointed Commander of the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]].<ref name="DB">{{DB|character|generalgrievous|Grievous, General}}</ref>
